bmad-help.description: BMad Help - show what to do next in your BMad workflow

bmad-product-brief.description: Create Brief - guided experience to nail down your product idea

bmad-brainstorming.description: Brainstorm - expert guided facilitation through brainstorming techniques

bmad-domain-research.description: Domain Research - industry domain deep dive, subject matter expertise and terminology

bmad-market-research.description: Market Research - market analysis, competitive landscape, customer needs and trends

bmad-technical-research.description: Technical Research - technical feasibility, architecture options and implementation approaches

bmad-create-prd.description: Create PRD - expert led facilitation to produce your Product Requirements Document

bmad-validate-prd.description: Validate PRD - validate a PRD against standards

bmad-edit-prd.description: Edit PRD - edit an existing PRD

bmad-create-ux.description: Create UX - guidance through realizing your UX plan

bmad-create-architecture.description: Create Architecture - guided workflow to document technical decisions

bmad-check-readiness.description: Check Implementation Readiness - ensure PRD, UX, Architecture and Epics/Stories are aligned

bmad-create-epics.description: Create Epics and Stories - break requirements into epics and user stories

bmad-create-story.description: Create Story - prepare next story in the sprint plan for implementation
bmad-create-story.template: Use the bmad-create-story skill with the create action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-validate-story.description: Validate Story - validate story readiness before development begins
bmad-validate-story.template: Use the bmad-create-story skill with the validate action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-sprint-planning.description: Sprint Planning - produce a plan the implementation agents will follow for every story

bmad-dev-story.description: Dev Story - execute story implementation tasks and tests

bmad-code-review.description: Code Review - review story implementation for quality and correctness

bmad-qa-tests.description: QA Automation Test - generate automated API and E2E tests for implemented code

bmad-sprint-status.description: Sprint Status - summarize sprint status and route to next workflow

bmad-retrospective.description: Retrospective - review completed epic, lessons learned

bmad-correct-course.description: Correct Course - navigate significant changes mid-sprint

bmad-quick-dev.description: Quick Dev - unified intent-in code-out workflow: clarify, plan, implement, review

bmad-generate-context.description: Generate Project Context - scan existing codebase to generate a lean LLM-optimized project-context.md

bmad-document-project.description: Document Project - analyze existing project to produce useful documentation

bmad-adversarial-review.description: Adversarial Review - cynical quality review before finalizing deliverables

bmad-edge-case-review.description: Edge Case Hunter - walk every branching path and boundary condition

bmad-editorial-prose.description: Editorial Review (Prose) - polish written content after drafting

bmad-editorial-structure.description: Editorial Review (Structure) - structural improvement for documents

bmad-shard-doc.description: Shard Document - split large documents into smaller organized files

bmad-distillator.description: Distillator - token-efficient lossless compression of documents for LLM consumption

bmad-index-docs.description: Index Docs - generate an index.md for available docs

bmad-party-mode.description: Party Mode - orchestrate multi-agent discussions with multiple perspectives

bmad-build-agent.description: Build an Agent - create or edit an agent skill through conversational discovery
bmad-build-agent.template: Use the bmad-agent-builder skill with the build-process action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-analyze-agent.description: Analyze an Agent - run quality analysis on an existing agent
bmad-analyze-agent.template: Use the bmad-agent-builder skill with the quality-analysis action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-build-workflow.description: Build a Workflow - create or edit a workflow/utility skill
bmad-build-workflow.template: Use the bmad-workflow-builder skill with the build-process action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-analyze-workflow.description: Analyze a Workflow - quality analysis on an existing workflow/skill
bmad-analyze-workflow.template: Use the bmad-workflow-builder skill with the quality-analysis action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-convert-skill.description: Convert a Skill - convert any skill to BMad-compliant equivalent
bmad-convert-skill.template: Use the bmad-workflow-builder skill with the convert-process action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-write-doc.description: Write Document - produce a document following documentation best practices
bmad-write-doc.template: Use the bmad-agent-tech-writer skill with the write action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-mermaid.description: Mermaid Generate - create a Mermaid diagram from description
bmad-mermaid.template: Use the bmad-agent-tech-writer skill with the mermaid action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-validate-doc.description: Validate Document - review document against documentation standards
bmad-validate-doc.template: Use the bmad-agent-tech-writer skill with the validate action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-explain-concept.description: Explain Concept - create clear technical explanations with examples and diagrams
bmad-explain-concept.template: Use the bmad-agent-tech-writer skill with the explain action. $ARGUMENTS

bmad-teach-testing.description: Teach Me Testing - learn testing fundamentals through structured sessions (TEA Academy)

bmad-atdd.description: ATDD - generate failing acceptance tests (TDD red phase)

bmad-test-framework.description: Test Framework - initialize production-ready test framework with Playwright or Cypress

bmad-ci-setup.description: CI Setup - configure CI/CD quality pipeline

bmad-test-review.description: Test Review - quality audit with 0-100 scoring

bmad-nfr.description: NFR Assessment - non-functional requirements assessment (performance, security, reliability)

bmad-traceability.description: Traceability - coverage traceability matrix and quality gate decision
